prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Rebar placement, part of the Structural & Ironwork scope. The observed field condition is: wrong bar size vs. schedule (deformation count/size - ID+DOC). The work is through its testing or inspection step. Reference material on hand: ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: Document check: Rebar placement (residential job)
